feed.title: Synerthink
feed.subtitle: Synerthink builds foundational computing products for autonomous systems. Dotlanth is a high-trust execution fabric focused on record-first observability, replayable runs, and capability-explicit security.

entry.title: Why Dotlanth Is Record-First
entry.summary: A research note on Dotlanth's record-first model: one syscall boundary, explicit capabilities, and run history written by default.

entry.title: Dotlanth v26.1.0-alpha
entry.summary: A foundational milestone for autonomous execution. Built seamlessly from the ground up for absolute trust and immediate inspectability.
